title: gentiana carinicostata subsp. carinicostata
intro: Gentiana carinicostata subsp. carinicostata is a species of flowering plant in the gentian family, native to China and used in traditional medicine. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve gastrointestinal issues, due to its high concentration of gentiopicrin. The health benefits of Gentiana carinicostata subsp. carinicostata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and act as an antioxidant. Gentiana carinicostata subsp. carinicostata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and capsules, allowing for a variety of preparations for its medicinal use.
